output: Batch 11 completed. Added new coverage in `tests/test_admin_payments.py` for the LLM classifier mappings (`confirmed`, `not_received`, `unclear` with reply), keyword fallback when the API key is missing, keyword fallback when the LLM call raises, first ambiguous-reply clarification with both the default text and an LLM-supplied reply, the recipient-facing negative-path notice plus admin DM, and module-level dead-code removal assertions against `admin_agent`, `admin_tools`, and `AdminChatCog`. Verification passed with `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py --tb=no -q --no-header` and the full suite `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/follow-up-cleanup-pass-after-20260411-0608/execution_batch_11.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added new tests in `tests/test_admin_payments.py` covering the LLM classifier `confirmed -> positive`, `not_received -> negative`, and `unclear -> ambiguous` with propagated reply paths; keyword fallback when the API key is missing; keyword fallback when the classifier call raises; first ambiguous-reply clarification with both the default message and an LLM-provided clarification reply; the recipient-facing negative-path notice while preserving the admin DM; and module-level dead-code removal assertions for `MEMBER_SYSTEM_PROMPT`, `MEMBER_MAX_CONVERSATION_LENGTH`, `MEMBER_TOOLS`, `ADMIN_ONLY_TOOLS`, `get_tools_for_role`, `_can_user_message_bot`, and `_is_directed_at_bot`. The LLM-path tests explicitly call `monkeypatch.setenv("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "test-key")` and then assign `cog._classifier_client` to a stubbed object with `messages.create = AsyncMock(...)`, so no real Anthropic client is constructed. Verification: `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with `59 passed, 1 warning`; `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with `209 passed, 4 warnings`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. The new tests cover all required scenarios: LLM confirmed/not_received/unclear-with-reply mappings, keyword fallback when the API key is missing, keyword fallback when the classifier raises, default ambiguous clarification, LLM-provided ambiguous clarification, negative-path recipient notice with the admin DM still sent, and dead-code `hasattr` removal assertions. The LLM-path tests both call `monkeypatch.setenv("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "test-key")` and directly assign `cog._classifier_client` to a stubbed client so no real Anthropic client is built.
